resources.string:
🗑️ "scratch that" → Delete last phrase
🗑️ "delete last word" → Delete last word
↩️ "undo" → Undo last 5 words
🗑️ "clear all" → Clear everything
, "comma" → Insert comma
. "full stop" → Insert period
? "question mark" → Insert ?
⏎ "new line" → Line break

1. Open any app (WhatsApp, Notes, etc.)
2. Tap a text input field
3. Switch to Smart Dictation keyboard
4. Tap the 🎤 mic button and speak!
5. Edit your text, then tap Insert
